creator: dim@FreeBSD.org
text:
Reading that upstream comment "[GCC type traits builtins] have been added recently to GCC without support for mangling", the question is: how recent is that? I.e. which version of gcc?

I see that in https://gcc.gnu.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=114652 you were using gcc13 which is now the ports default, but I would expect older versions to still fall over?
